message:
test(proptest): expand lockfree (24→57), kalman_watchdog (22→38), environment (23→35) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

lockfree: read_with/write_with, for_each_mut/map_all_mut, insert-returns-old,
DistributionStats invariants, monotonicity, commutativity, idempotent reset,
ShardedMap retain/clear/shard_sizes, counter load() consistency, defaults.
kalman_watchdog: first observation init, z_score correctness, variance reduction,
estimate interpolation, classify/config/tracker accessors, serde determinism.
environment: AutoConfig serde, agent detection packs, dedup packs, monotone
concurrent_captures/poll_interval, ConfigSource/ConnectionType serde, remotes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
